proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_palbociclib have longer pfs_months (mean PFS) than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_tamoxifen have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_olaparib have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have longer pfs_months than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: on palbociclib = 5.408 vs off = 4.310 (diff = +1.098, Welch t-test p = 0).
Mean pfs_months: on tamoxifen = 4.723 vs off = 4.680 (diff = +0.043, Welch t-test p = 0.0769).
Mean pfs_months: on trastuzumab = 4.645 vs off = 4.705 (diff = -0.060, Welch t-test p = 0.0292).
Mean pfs_months: on olaparib = 4.660 vs off = 4.696 (diff = -0.036, Welch t-test p = 0.33).
Mean pfs_months: on sacituzumab_govitecan = 4.686 vs off = 4.694 (diff = -0.007, Welch t-test p = 0.846).
Mean pfs_months: on pembrolizumab = 4.630 vs off = 4.704 (diff = -0.074, Welch t-test p = 0.0175).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with er_positive = 1 have longer pfs_months than ER-negative patients.
Patients with pr_positive = 1 have longer pfs_months than PR-negative patients.
Patients with her2_positive = 1 have shorter pfs_months than HER2-negative patients.
Patients with her2_low = 1 have different pfs_months than her2_low = 0 patients.
Patients with brca1_mutation = 1 have different pfs_months than brca1-wildtype patients.
Patients with brca2_mutation = 1 have different pfs_months than brca2-wildtype patients.
Patients with pik3ca_mutation = 1 have shorter pfs_months than pik3ca-wildtype patients.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: er_positive=1 -> 4.865 vs =0 -> 4.297 (diff = +0.568, Welch t-test p = 3.7e-143).
Mean pfs_months: pr_positive=1 -> 4.824 vs =0 -> 4.462 (diff = +0.362, Welch t-test p = 5.82e-59).
Mean pfs_months: her2_positive=1 -> 4.317 vs =0 -> 4.776 (diff = -0.459, Welch t-test p = 6.1e-70).
Mean pfs_months: her2_low=1 -> 4.765 vs =0 -> 4.650 (diff = +0.114, Welch t-test p = 1.04e-06).
Mean pfs_months: brca1_mutation=1 -> 4.669 vs =0 -> 4.694 (diff = -0.024, Welch t-test p = 0.724).
Mean pfs_months: brca2_mutation=1 -> 4.569 vs =0 -> 4.696 (diff = -0.127, Welch t-test p = 0.0813).
Mean pfs_months: pik3ca_mutation=1 -> 4.328 vs =0 -> 4.887 (diff = -0.559, Welch t-test p = 6.07e-144).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv = 1 have shorter pfs_months than non-stage-IV patients.
Patients with has_brain_mets = 1 have shorter pfs_months than those without brain mets.
Patients with liver_mets = 1 have shorter pfs_months than those without liver mets.
Patients with bone_mets = 1 have shorter pfs_months than those without bone mets.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Larger tumor_size_cm is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: stage_iv=1 -> 3.617 vs =0 -> 5.153 (diff = -1.536, p = 0).
Mean pfs_months: has_brain_mets=1 -> 3.750 vs =0 -> 4.800 (diff = -1.050, p = 1.45e-178).
Mean pfs_months: liver_mets=1 -> 4.708 vs =0 -> 4.690 (diff = +0.018, p = 0.555).
Mean pfs_months: bone_mets=1 -> 4.723 vs =0 -> 4.685 (diff = +0.038, p = 0.17).
OLS slope of pfs_months on ecog_ps = -1.1800 months per unit (p = 0).
OLS slope of pfs_months on age_years = +0.17592 months per year (p = 0).
OLS slope of pfs_months on tumor_size_cm = +0.00055 months per cm (p = 0.931).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The PFS benefit of treatment_palbociclib is larger in er_positive=1 patients than in ER-negative patients (positive interaction term in OLS of pfs_months on treatment_palbociclib * er_positive).
The PFS effect of treatment_trastuzumab is more favorable in her2_positive=1 patients than in HER2-negative patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS effect of treatment_olaparib is more favorable in patients with brca1_mutation=1 OR brca2_mutation=1 than in BRCA-wildtype patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS effect of treatment_tamoxifen is more favorable in er_positive=1 patients than in ER-negative patients (positive interaction term).
The PFS effect of treatment_pembrolizumab is more favorable in msi_high=1 patients than in msi_high=0 patients (positive interaction term).

analyses.result_summary: Main palbo effect (ER-): -0.017 (p=0.671); interaction palbo:ER+ = +1.594 months (p=9.31e-229).
Main trastuzumab effect (HER2-): -0.051 (p=0.0965); interaction trastuzumab:HER2+ = -0.028 months (p=0.695).
Main olaparib effect (BRCA-wt): -0.056 (p=0.145); interaction olaparib:BRCA-any = +0.402 months (p=0.0208).
Main tamoxifen effect (ER-): +0.081 (p=0.0652); interaction tamoxifen:ER+ = -0.058 months (p=0.27).
Main pembro effect (MSS): -0.077 (p=0.0144); interaction pembro:MSI-H = +0.217 months (p=0.466).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher ki67_pct is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on albumin_g_dl = +0.49877 (p = 9.39e-112).
OLS slope of pfs_months on ldh_u_l = -0.00051 (p = 0.000245).
OLS slope of pfs_months on crp_mg_l = -0.00088 (p = 0.461).
OLS slope of pfs_months on nlr = +0.00331 (p = 0.537).
OLS slope of pfs_months on hemoglobin_g_dl = -0.00639 (p = 0.304).
OLS slope of pfs_months on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l = -0.00067 (p = 0.00295).
OLS slope of pfs_months on weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.07473 (p = 4.07e-148).
OLS slope of pfs_months on ki67_pct = -0.01876 (p = 2.98e-93).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher cough_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope of pfs_months on fatigue_grade = +0.00047 (p = 0.963).
OLS slope of pfs_months on pain_nrs = -0.00149 (p = 0.72).
OLS slope of pfs_months on dyspnea_grade = +0.01037 (p = 0.299).
OLS slope of pfs_months on appetite_loss_grade = -0.00183 (p = 0.861).
OLS slope of pfs_months on cough_grade = -0.00887 (p = 0.384).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with rural_residence = 1 have shorter pfs_months than urban residents.
PFS differs across insurance_type categories (one-way ANOVA on pfs_months by insurance_type).
PFS differs across race_ethnicity categories (one-way ANOVA on pfs_months by race_ethnicity).
Higher education_years is associated with longer pfs_months (positive slope).
Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Postmenopausal patients (postmenopausal=1) have different pfs_months than premenopausal (postmenopausal=0).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months: rural=1 -> 4.714 vs rural=0 -> 4.688 (diff = +0.027, p = 0.343).

One-way ANOVA pfs_months ~ insurance_type: F=0.310, p=0.818; group means {'medicaid': 4.706401053979717, 'medicare': 4.692075376537438, 'private': 4.684984896296144, 'uninsured': 4.732867153700463}; max-min spread 0.048 months.
OLS slope of pfs_months on education_years = -0.00324 (p=0.388).
OLS slope of pfs_months on smoking_pack_years = -0.00033 (p=0.479).
pfs_months postmeno=1 -> 4.684 vs =0 -> 4.707 (diff = -0.023, p = 0.311).

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs1065852 (CYP2D6*10 proxy) modifies the PFS effect of treatment_tamoxifen (non-zero interaction in OLS).
snp_rs4244285 (CYP2C19*2 proxy) modifies the PFS effect of treatment_palbociclib (non-zero interaction).
snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T proxy) is associated with pfs_months on its own (non-zero OLS slope).
snp_rs429358 (APOE proxy) is associated with pfs_months on its own (non-zero OLS slope).
snp_rs1800629 (TNF-alpha promoter proxy) modifies the PFS effect of treatment_pembrolizumab (non-zero interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Main treatment_tamoxifen effect (snp=0): +0.043 (p=0.094); main snp_rs1065852 effect: +0.0343 (p=0.404); interaction treatment_tamoxifen:snp_rs1065852 = -0.0024 (p=0.975).
Main treatment_palbociclib effect (snp=0): +1.088 (p=0); main snp_rs4244285 effect: -0.0300 (p=0.355); interaction treatment_palbociclib:snp_rs4244285 = +0.0477 (p=0.387).
Main treatment_pembrolizumab effect (snp=0): -0.074 (p=0.0318); main snp_rs1800629 effect: -0.0178 (p=0.572); interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:snp_rs1800629 = -0.0007 (p=0.993).
OLS slope pfs_months on snp_rs1801133 = +0.0284 months per allele unit (p = 0.243).
OLS slope pfs_months on snp_rs429358 = -0.0338 months per allele unit (p = 0.28).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with diabetes_mellitus = 1 have shorter pfs_months than non-diabetics.
Patients with chronic_kidney_disease = 1 have shorter pfs_months.
Patients with heart_failure = 1 have shorter pfs_months.
Patients with interstitial_lung_disease_history = 1 have shorter pfs_months.
Patients with prior_chemotherapy = 1 have shorter pfs_months than chemo-naive patients.
More prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher years_since_diagnosis is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: pfs_months: diabetes_mellitus=1 -> 4.710 vs =0 -> 4.688 (diff = +0.022, p = 0.413).
pfs_months: chronic_kidney_disease=1 -> 4.707 vs =0 -> 4.691 (diff = +0.016, p = 0.642).
pfs_months: heart_failure=1 -> 4.707 vs =0 -> 4.691 (diff = +0.016, p = 0.671).
pfs_months: interstitial_lung_disease_history=1 -> 4.680 vs =0 -> 4.693 (diff = -0.013, p = 0.819).
pfs_months: prior_chemotherapy=1 -> 4.694 vs =0 -> 4.692 (diff = +0.002, p = 0.936).
OLS slope on prior_lines_of_therapy = +0.0093 (p=0.343).
OLS slope on years_since_diagnosis = -0.0032 (p=0.63).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for stage_iv, has_brain_mets, ecog_ps, age_years, ldh_u_l, albumin_g_dl, er_positive, her2_positive, and prior_lines_of_therapy, treatment_palbociclib retains a positive, significant association with pfs_months.

After adjustment in the same multivariable OLS, ecog_ps, stage_iv, has_brain_mets, ldh_u_l, and prior_lines_of_therapy each retain an independent negative association with pfs_months, while albumin_g_dl and er_positive retain independent positive associations.
The PFS benefit of treatment_palbociclib differs by stage_iv (non-zero interaction term in OLS of pfs_months on treatment_palbociclib * stage_iv adjusted for ecog_ps and age_years).
Within er_positive=1 patients, treatment_palbociclib still extends pfs_months relative to those not on palbo (positive simple effect in stratified t-test).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + treatment_tamoxifen + treatment_trastuzumab + treatment_olaparib + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + treatment_pembrolizumab + stage_iv + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + ecog_ps + age_years + ldh_u_l + albumin_g_dl + crp_mg_l + nlr + er_positive + pr_positive + her2_positive + pik3ca_mutation + prior_lines_of_therapy + tumor_size_cm + ki67_pct', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for treatment_palbociclib = +1.0991 months (p = 0); model R^2 = 0.778.

Adjusted coefficients (months per unit / per indicator): ecog_ps: -1.1721 (p=0); stage_iv: -1.5452 (p=0); has_brain_mets: -0.9849 (p=0); ldh_u_l: -0.0005 (p=7.81e-16); prior_lines_of_therapy: -0.0004 (p=0.932); albumin_g_dl: +0.4773 (p=0); er_positive: +0.5355 (p=1.76e-261); her2_positive: -0.4770 (p=4.2e-264); pik3ca_mutation: -0.5834 (p=0); crp_mg_l: -0.0001 (p=0.875); nlr: -0.0003 (p=0.892); tumor_size_cm: +0.0020 (p=0.502); age_years: +0.1756 (p=0); ki67_pct: -0.0189 (p=0); liver_mets: -0.0153 (p=0.296); bone_mets: +0.0155 (p=0.237).

analyses.code: smf.ols('pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib * stage_iv + ecog_ps + age_years', data=df).fit()
analyses.result_summary: Main palbo (stage<IV): +1.096 (p=0); interaction palbo:stage_iv = +0.0248 (p=0.361).

analyses.code: Welch t-test on palbo within er_positive==1 subset
